steps.t: Ulishár stands by the road into Idagâl.
Your next destination is the small village of Ahâba located by the oasis in Idagâl.
The herdsman Malgârzor in Ahâba eyes you cautiously.
The herdsman Malgârzor in Ahâba will be interested to hear that you dealt with the vultures, as well as the vultures.
Rahâzi is at Ahâba in Idagâl.
